title: Remove CNI for podman6
body:
<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->


See individual commits.

This is vendored into https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6453 and https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28202

comments.body: Addressed comments, but I'll take a bit to vendor the latest into buildah and podman before removing draft status. You're welcome to review this though.

Linked buildah and podman PRs have passing tests apart from the likely unrelated compose and machine test failures. I think I've addressed all comments on this PR too. Removing draft status from here. PTAL @containers/container-libs-maintainers
